transcript: bystanders rushing to save a little boy when he got pulled underwater by a powerful wave in Hawaii. And we have video tonight. A South Korea family was having a fun day at Sunset Beach when their eight-year-old son suddenly was swallowed up by a wave. Several people then panicked, rushing into the water when they saw that boy go under. They didn't know if he stood any chance at all against that relentless current. So the boy's mother says she was in shock when she saw that wave swallow him up. I thought that maybe my son will die. Everything turned to the light and everything turned to like a heaven. The minute I saw the second wave come, that's when I got up and I started sprinting I dive in right when he disappeared and I was just so scared because I'm not only thinking about saving him but what what's gonna happen if I get dragged in yeah the group pulled the boy to safety before he was injured
